name: New Federated Domain Added
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Splunk Threat Research Team (original rule), Harjot Singh @cyb3rjy0t (sigma rule)
SIGMA Title: New Federated Domain Added
SIGMA Description: Detects the addition of a new Federated Domain.

False positives:
- The creation of a new Federated domain is not necessarily malicious, however these events need to be followed closely, as it may indicate federated credential abuse or backdoor via federated identities at a similar or different cloud provider.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%domain%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%add%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New Federated Domain Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%domain%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%add%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%new%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New Federated Domain Added

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
